data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for acknowledgment before shift booking/work assignment.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the acknowledgment requirement before shift booking/work assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for acknowledgment, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of this requirement being implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming acknowledgment requirement is enforced before shift booking/work assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the acknowledgment requirement.
